data.name: Hentai Girls: Contact [18+]
data.detailed_description:
Add to your wishlist and follow to the game, thanks!


關於此遊戲

The popular hentai puzzle franchise has reached a new level, now with visual novel elements! More than 20 naked pictures of AAA quality, various mechanics, female moans, three difficulty levels, gallery, 100 achievements, relaxing music and beautiful graphics 🥰

Key features

  • more than 20 naked pictures of AAA quality
  • various mechanics
  • visual novel elements
  • arousing female moans
  • three difficulty levels (easy, medium and hard)
  • zoom (you can see every detail!)
  • high-quality design (interface, animations, effects) and pleasant relaxing music
  • gallery (can be used with one hand)
  • cheat (F key)
  • 100 achievements: alphabet, numbers and symbols (for Steam profile design)

Achievement Showcase

(will be available after Steam approval)

data.short_description: The popular hentai puzzle franchise has reached a new level, now with visual novel elements! More than 20 naked pictures of AAA quality, various mechanics, female moans, three difficulty levels, gallery, 100 achievements, relaxing music and beautiful graphics
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 俄文, 日文, 德文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: 2.4 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 10/11/12
  • 儲存空間: 150 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10/11
  • Processor: 2.4 Ghz Dual Core
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Graphics card supporting DirectX 10/11/12
  • Storage: 150 MB available space
  • Sound Card: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
